entry.title: [AINews] not much happened today
entry.summary: a quiet day.

entry.title: BTQ Technologies and TIDAL PWR Partner to Develop Trusted Quantum Data Center Reference Architectures
entry.summary: Quantum infrastructure developer BTQ Technologies Corp. (Nasdaq: BTQ / Cboe CA: BTQ) has entered into a strategic collaboration with Texas-based power generation and data center developer TIDAL PWR. The partnership focuses on building a standardized, repeatable blueprint for integrating quantum processing units (QPUs) — Also covered by: The Quantum Insider

entry.title: Qwen-Image-3.0: Rich Content, Authentic Details, Deep Knowledge
entry.summary: Article URL: https://qwen.ai/blog?id=qwen-image-3.0 Comments URL: https://news.ycombinator.com/item?id=48989701 Points: 175 # Comments: 90

entry.title: Gritt, which is developing an AI system that helps build infrastructure like solar panels, emerges from stealth with a $26M Series A and $34M in total funding (Tim Fernholz/TechCrunch)
entry.summary: Tim Fernholz / TechCrunch : Gritt, which is developing an AI system that helps build infrastructure like solar panels, emerges from stealth with a $26M Series A and $34M in total funding — One of the most important things happening on Earth today is the solar energy build-out. Around the world, companies and countries

entry.title: llama.cpp b10075 released
entry.summary: hexagon: add CLAMP op ( #25934 ) Website: https://llama.app macOS/iOS: macOS Apple Silicon (arm64) macOS Apple Silicon (arm64, KleidiAI enabled) DISABLED macOS Intel (x64) iOS XCFramework Linux: Ubuntu x64 (CPU) Ubuntu arm64 (CPU) Ubuntu s390x (CPU) Ubuntu x64 (Vulkan) Ubuntu arm64 (Vulkan) Ubuntu x64 (ROCm 7.2) Ubuntu

entry.title: ollama v0.32.2 released
entry.summary: What's Changed launch: keep Claude Code channels available by @hoyyeva in #17210 cmd: remove dead agent prompt wrappers by @ParthSareen in #17227 agent: reorder working directory instruction by @ParthSareen in #17228 agent: clean up semantics, UX, DX, and procedural code by @ParthSareen in #17212 agent: allow unlimited

entry.title: US-Based Axiom Seeks Hong Kong IPO to Tap China’s Biotech Boom
entry.summary: Axiom Biosciences is considering an initial public offering in Hong Kong, a rare move for an American biotechnology firm, and one that would help it tap China’s booming clinical development capabilities.

entry.title: NVIDIA Releases Cosmos 3 Edge: A 4B-Parameter Open World Model That Reasons and Generates Robot Actions On-Device
entry.summary: NVIDIA has released Cosmos 3 Edge, a 4-billion-parameter open world model built to run on-device. It helps robots and vision AI agents understand surroundings, reason in real time, and generate robot actions locally. The Cosmos 3 family included Cosmos 3 Nano (16B) and Cosmos 3 Super (64B) shipped on May 31, 2026 at GT

entry.title: Last Week in AI #251 - Mythos Back, Sonnet 5, Etched, LongCat
entry.summary: Trump lifts restrictions on Anthropic, Anthropic launches Claude Sonnet 5, Google's NotebookLM updates, chips stories from Etched and Baidu, and more!

entry.title: Kimi K3 marks the arrival of frontier open-weight models, and the Kimi team has incredible culture and freedom of expression within a GPU-limited environment (Nathan Lambert/Interconnects AI)
entry.summary: Nathan Lambert / Interconnects AI : Kimi K3 marks the arrival of frontier open-weight models, and the Kimi team has incredible culture and freedom of expression within a GPU-limited environment — The global implications on the AI ecosystem. … Audio playback is not supported on your browser. Please upgrade.

entry.title: LWiAI Podcast #247 - Opus 4.8, MAI, Anthropic IPO, Minimax-M3
entry.summary: New Models, IPO Announcements, and the Rise of Open Source Competitors

entry.title: Safety and alignment in an era of long-horizon models
entry.summary: OpenAI shares lessons from deploying long-running AI models, highlighting new safety risks, observed failures, and improved safeguards through iterative deployment.

entry.title: PlanFlip: Attacking Multi-Agent LLM Systems via Planning-Phase Prompt Injection
entry.summary: arXiv:2607.16199v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Multi-agent LLM systems increasingly rely on a Planner to decompose goals into sub-task sequences that downstream Executor and Critic agents execute and audit. We identify the planning phase as a critical attack surface: a single injection into the Planner's context achie

entry.title: Critical Palo Alto VPN bug now exploited by Qilin ransomware gang
entry.summary: The Qilin ransomware gang is exploiting a critical PAN-OS GlobalProtect authentication bypass flaw to breach victims' networks, according to cybersecurity company Arctic Wolf. [...]

entry.title: Microsoft shares manual fix for WSUS sync delays and timeouts
entry.summary: Microsoft has shared manual mitigations to help IT administrators fix Windows Server Update Services (WSUS) servers affected by a known issue that causes Windows Update scans to fail or time out. [...]

entry.title: Closing The Series A Gap Is The Next Great Opportunity For Black Founders In The AI Era
entry.summary: While 2026 has shown encouraging signs, with Black-founded startups raising approximately $643 million by late May, the strongest quarter since mid-2022, the improvement was driven largely by a handful of unusually large financings. James Norman and Sean Green, co-founders of Black Operator Ventures share their thought

entry.title: Dell Technologies Capital: How To Build A Deep-Tech Startup For A Market That Isn’t Ready Yet And Why AI Won’t Kill SaaS
entry.summary: In this interview with Crunchbase News, Daniel Docter, managing director at Dell Technologies Capital, discusses how AI is reshaping SaaS and why he doesn’t believe the business model is headed for extinction, why he thinks distribution may ultimately separate the winners from the losers among AI startups, and more.

entry.title: Gritt exits stealth with $34 million for robots to build solar plants—then, everything else
entry.summary: Gritt is coming out of stealth with $34 million and plan to automate the hardest tasks on construction sites.

entry.title: IonQ, QuantumBasel Study Suggests Hybrid AI Workloads Could Gain Energy Advantages From Quantum Hardware as Systems Scale
entry.summary: Insider Brief A hybrid quantum-classical approach to fine-tuning artificial intelligence models could eventually consume less energy than classical simulation while matching or surpassing several conventional machine-learning methods on a text classification task, offering an early indication that quantum computers may

entry.title: Alibaba's Qwen Audio 3.0 TTS Plus tops the competition in the text-to-speech rankings
entry.summary: Alibaba's Qwen Audio 3.0 TTS Plus tops Artificial Analysis' Speech Arena leaderboard. The model supports 16 languages and lets users control speaking style with natural language or tags like [angry]. At 16 characters per second, though, it's far slower than rivals Sonic 3.5 and Simba 3.2. The article Alibaba's Qwen Aud

entry.title: How AI may drive union-resistant tech workers to the bargaining table
entry.summary: Tech workers are increasingly unionizing, trading Silicon Valley’s myth of exceptionalism for collective bargaining to contest the corporate deployment of artificial intelligence For decades, the technology industry was a fortress that labor unions couldn’t breach. Tech workers already had cushy compensation packages,

entry.title: Voltaic , local first notion clone
entry.summary: submitted by /u/KNH_537 [link] [comments]

entry.title: New ENCFORGE Ransomware Targets AI Model Files in Langflow RCE Attack
entry.summary: Researchers at Sysdig have linked a second attack on the same Langflow server to JADEPUFFER, the AI-agent-driven operator it first documented earlier this month. The same operator has now been spotted deploying ENCFORGE, a new compiled Go ransomware designed to encrypt model weights, vector indexes, training datasets,

entry.title: LWiAI Podcast #249 - Fable 5 ban, SpaceX Cursor + IPO, OSS Aplenty
entry.summary: Exploring the Fable 5 ban, SpaceX’s strategic acquisition, and a burst of open source advancements

entry.title: Victoria Debt Deal Faces Opposition From HSBC Bank
entry.summary: UK carpet maker Victoria Plc.’s bid to restructure its balance sheet is facing resistance from HSBC Holdings Plc, a holder of the company’s bonds.

entry.title: National Grid taps into US AI power boom
entry.summary: The UK utility company is investing $1.75bn in a developer focused on supplying power to data centres

entry.title: Rater State Bias in RLHF Preference Data: An Audit Framework
entry.summary: arXiv:2607.16195v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: We identify a structured confound in Reinforcement Learning from Human Feedback (RLHF). Pairwise preference labels are intended to reflect the compared outputs, but they may also reflect the rater's state during annotation. Under sustained stressful or distressing conditi

entry.title: Design and Validation of a Lightweight 1D CNN for Affective Touch Classification in Soft Plush Companions
entry.summary: arXiv:2607.16196v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Soft, sensorized companions offer a physically safe and emotionally intuitive interface for socially assistive technologies, yet their deformability and multichannel tactile sensing complicate the robust interpretation of human affect. This study presents a complete open-

entry.title: OpenHands v1.47.0 released
entry.summary: 1.47.0 (2026-07-21) What's Changed Features feat: protect Agent Canvas behind SaaS auth by @malhotra5 in #15286 Bug Fixes fix: retry idempotent runtime-api reads once on timeout by @ak684 in #15266 fix(agent-profiles): honor profile settings in cloud launches by @simonrosenberg in #15228 fix: Fix CVE-2026-53571 : Updat

entry.title: X relaunches a rebuilt Android app after year-long effort
entry.summary: X says the rebuilt version of its Android app is now available globally.
